hero.subtitle: A ₹20 NFC card that works when you can't speak. Any bystander taps it with their phone — instantly sees your blood group, allergies, and alerts your family. No app needed.

testimonials.title: What People Think
testimonials.subtitle: Feedback on our emergency health identity concept
testimonials.story1Quote: As a college student who rides a bike every day, the concept of a ₹20 card that holds emergency health details and offline alerts is a game-changer. It's affordable and can actually save lives. Can't wait to order one!
testimonials.story2Quote: As a physiotherapist, I see people with sports injuries and sudden physical crises daily. An offline NFC card/wristband containing vital medical details and contacts is a brilliant concept for anyone with an active lifestyle.
testimonials.story3Quote: My elderly parents live in another city, and I constantly worry about their safety. A tap-to-read emergency card that doesn't need any app or internet setup is the most practical solution I've seen. This idea is highly needed.
testimonials.story4Quote: The idea of using cheap, accessible NFC cards to create emergency health IDs for everyone in India is incredibly promising. It bypasses internet barriers entirely. If this scales, it will redefine emergency response.

about.heroTitle: One Tap Can Save a Life
about.heroDesc: We are building India's fastest, most secure, and completely offline-first NFC emergency health identity platform.
about.storyP1: SwasthyaTap was born out of a simple yet critical realization: during medical emergencies, every second counts. However, vital health data—like blood group, severe allergies, chronic conditions, and emergency contacts—is often inaccessible when a patient cannot communicate.
about.storyP2: By leveraging offline-first NFC technology, we created a card that fits in any wallet and can be read by any modern smartphone instantly, without requiring internet connectivity or any mobile app installations. It enables bystanders and medical professionals to act with precision, saving precious time.
about.pillar1Desc: Giving every individual an affordable, reliable health identity card to ensure safety wherever they go.
about.pillar2Desc: Enabling first responders to read life-saving health details in under 1 second without internet barriers.
about.pillar3Desc: Ensuring user control with granular privacy settings, 4-digit PIN protection, and full DPDP compliance.
about.founder1Desc: Driving the architectural design and secure offline-first NFC technology of SwasthyaTap.
about.founder2Desc: Leading the product strategy, hospital integration, and scaling the emergency network across India.
about.companyDesc: Designed and developed by SwasthyaTap. Committed to building secure, digital-first healthcare infrastructure for 140 Crore Indians.
